filename: 案例-20260420-001-文件操作-OpenClawUltimate指南AI智能体Workfor-自动化案例
title: OpenClawUltimate指南AI智能体Workfor
problem:
Setup Tips and Best Practices: If you’re non-technical and attempting this, a few tips:

   Use Community Configs: Many have shared their `openclaw.json` config files (which define models, skills, etc.). Starting from a proven template can skip a lot of trial and error.

   Dedicated Accounts: As mentioned, create separate accounts for the agent where possible. For example, a secondary Google account that has access to a shared calendar instead of letting it loose on your primary Google account.

metadata.originalTitle: OpenClaw: Ultimate Guide to AI Agent Workforce 2026 - O-mega.ai
